LanguageData.SGM.GateDialFailed: Could not activate stargate: Receiving gate no longer exists or is currently in use.
LanguageData.SGM.BlockedByLandmark: Stargate sites cannot be placed on landmarks.
LanguageData.SGM.CannotWake: Cannot wake gate: this map already contains an active gate.
LanguageData.SGM.CannotWake_SourceMap: Cannot Wake gate: This pocket map's parent map already contains an active gate.
LanguageData.SGM.CannotWake_ChildMap: Cannot wake gate: (one of) This map's child pocket map(s) already contains an active gate.
LanguageData.SGM.Notif.GateHibernating: Built gate is hibernating: Active gate already present on this map.
LanguageData.SGM.Notif.GateHibernating_SourceMap: Built gate is hibernating: This pocket map's parent map already contains an active gate.
LanguageData.SGM.Notif.GateHibernating_ChildMap: Built gate is hibernating: (one of) This map's child pocket map(s) already contains an active gate.
LanguageData.SGM.GateHibernating: Address conflict: Gate in hibernation mode.
LanguageData.SGM.RespawnGateString: Please respawn this gate (and its accompanying DHD) using devmode, as an update has broken it.
LanguageData.SGM.WakeHibernationDesc: Wake this stargate from hibernation, making it the active gate for this location. Only one gate can be active on a location, including any linked (pocket / parent) maps.
LanguageData.SGM.OpenCloseIrisDesc: Open or close this stargate's iris.
LanguageData.SGM.CreateSGSiteDesc: Create a new stargate site at this location.
LanguageData.SGM.RenameGateSiteDesc: Give this stargate site a more recognisable name.
LanguageData.SGM.TransmitGDODesc: Transmit an identification code through the gate, opening the iris on the other side.
LanguageData.SGM.SelectConnectedGateDesc: Jump to the gate on the other side of the wormhole connection.
LanguageData.SGM.SelectGateConflictDesc: Jump to the gate that's preventing this gate from waking.
LanguageData.SGM.BringThingToGateAction: Bring item or pawn to stargate
LanguageData.SGM.CarryHeldToStargateAction_Disabled: Cannot carry to stargate: stargate not active
LanguageData.SGM.CannotDecodeSGSymbols: Cannot decode: glyph deciphering not researched
LanguageData.SGM.CannotDialGateIsActive: Cannot dial: stargate is already active
LanguageData.SGM.CannotDialInvalidAddress: Stargate has no registered address. (Try reinstalling this stargate)
LanguageData.SGM.ShortenDialSeq.Label: Shorten gate dial sequence
LanguageData.SGM.ShortenDialSeq.TT: Shorten the time it takes for the gate to dial an address.
LanguageData.SGM.DebugMode.Label: Debug mode
LanguageData.SGM.ToggleablePatches.Text: Optional patch-based settings from this mod can be found in the Vanilla Expanded Framework settings, under "Toggleable Patches"
